Disclaimer

Disclaimer

Herbal Tea Bag Guide provides general information, cultural context, product research, and reflection tools. It is not a professional advisory service.

General information only

Articles, tools, checklists, readings, reports, and product notes are provided for education, planning, and personal reference. They should not be treated as medical, legal, financial, safety, psychological, or other professional advice.

No guaranteed outcomes

Cultural meanings, symbolic interpretations, number readings, dream explanations, wedding customs, tea gift suggestions, and I Ching reflections can vary by person, family, region, school, and situation. We do not guarantee a specific result, prediction, purchase outcome, health effect, relationship outcome, or business result.

Products, ads, affiliates, and paid reports

This site may include advertising, affiliate links, product comparison notes, digital reports, or paid checkout options. Visitors should verify product details, prices, policies, delivery terms, and suitability before making a purchase. Affiliate or advertising relationships do not remove the visitor's responsibility to compare options independently.

User responsibility

Use the content as a structured starting point. For important decisions involving health, money, law, safety, relationships, or personal risk, consult a qualified professional or trusted source before acting.

Contact

For questions about this disclaimer, contact guan@shanyuegroup.com.

Herbal Tea Bag Guide

Choose herbal tea bags by flavor, moment, and gift setting without medical claims.

Herbal Tea Bag Guide publishes practical guides, tools, resources, and FAQ for readers.
